name: fab-speed-dial
title: FAB Speed Dial
description: A floating action button that expands into staggered mini-actions with labels, a rotating main icon, and an optional backdrop dim. Expands in any direction.
usage:
let fab = SpeedDialButton(mainIcon: UIImage(systemName: "plus"), actions: [
    .init(icon: UIImage(systemName: "camera"), title: "Photo") { },
    .init(icon: UIImage(systemName: "doc"), title: "File") { },
])
view.addSubview(fab)
